notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez singles on a line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. José Ramírez to 2nd. José Ramírez advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.

notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Bo Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Bo Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Jacob Webb picks off Angel Martínez at 1st on throw to first baseman Michael Busch.
